story.title: Space Capacity and "Room Full" Handling
story.description: As a user, I want clear visual indication when a space is at capacity, so that I don't try to join full spaces and get blocked.

criterion.title: Occupancy Count Visible on Card
criterion.description: ModernSpaceCard displays occupancy count (e.g., "6 Active"). Count updates in real-time as users join/leave. Format: "{current}/{capacity}" or "{current} Active" if no capacity limit.

criterion.title: Full Spaces Have Visual Treatment
criterion.description: Full spaces (occupancy ≥ capacity) have dimmed appearance. "Full" badge displayed prominently on card. Badge styled per theme (e.g., red in Neon, muted in Zen).

criterion.title: Join Button Disabled for Full Spaces
criterion.description: "Join" button disabled when space is at capacity. Disabled button shows tooltip explaining "Space is full". Visual state change (grayed out, cursor not-allowed).

criterion.title: Attention Beacon Triggers at 80% Capacity
criterion.description: Beacon fires automatically when occupancy reaches 80% of capacity. Beacon type: "warning" (not critical) per UX spec. Beacon message: "Space nearing capacity". Integrates with existing AttentionBeacon system (Story 3.4).

criterion.title: Capacity Validation Enforced in API
criterion.description: POST /api/spaces/[id]/join validates capacity before allowing join. Returns 409 Conflict if space is full with error message. Race condition handling: Check capacity atomically with join.

criterion.title: Capacity Display in SpaceDetailPanel
criterion.description: SpaceDetailPanel shows capacity info: "6 of 10 participants". Progress bar or indicator showing how full the space is. Clear messaging when space is full.

criterion.title: Theme-Aware Capacity Styling
criterion.description: "Full" badge and disabled states use theme tokens. Works correctly in all 4 themes (Neon, Zen, Obsidian, Paper). Consistent with existing warning/error color patterns.

criterion.title: Accessibility for Capacity States
criterion.description: Screen reader announces capacity status: "Space Engineering Hub, 6 of 10 participants, nearing capacity". "Full" badge has appropriate aria-label. Disabled join button announces why it's disabled.

file.purpose: Main space card component - add capacity indicator, full badge, dimmed styling

importantPatterns.pattern: Uses useAttentionBeacon hook for warning states

file.changeRequired: - Add CapacityIndicator component import - Add FullBadge component import - Calculate isFull and capacityPercentage - Apply dimmed styling when isFull: opacity-70, grayscale(30%) - Render FullBadge when isFull === true - Render CapacityIndicator with current/capacity counts

file.purpose: Action buttons for spaces - add disabled state for Join when full
file.changeRequired: - Add isFull prop to SpaceActionButtonsProps interface - Apply disabled styling to Join button when isFull - Add title attribute for tooltip - Add aria-disabled for accessibility - Prevent onClick when disabled

file.purpose: Detail panel - add capacity section with progress bar
file.changeRequired: - Add CapacityIndicator with showBar={true} - Calculate isFull and pass to SpaceActionButtons - Add capacity section below participant roster - Show "Space is full" message when at capacity

file.purpose: Existing capacity indicator component - may extend or reuse
file.changeRequired: - Extend existing CapacityIndicator with showBar prop - Add progress bar element - Update to use CSS variable tokens - Add aria-live="polite" for accessibility

file.purpose: Hook for beacon trigger logic - extend with capacity threshold
file.changeRequired: - Update reason message to "Space nearing capacity" - Add check for 100% capacity with reason "Space is full" - Ensure beacon fires at exactly 80% threshold

file.purpose: Design tokens for floor plan components
CSS custom properties for theme tokens
file.changeRequired: - Add --vo-capacity-bar-height: 4px - Add --vo-capacity-bar-radius: 2px - Add --vo-capacity-bar-bg: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.2) - Add --vo-capacity-normal: var(--vo-text-muted) - Add --vo-capacity-warning: var(--vo-signal-warning) - Add --vo-capacity-full: var(--vo-signal-critical) - Add --vo-full-badge-bg for each theme - Add --vo-full-badge-text for each theme - Add theme-specific overrides for [data-theme="neon|zen|obsidian|paper"]

file.purpose: Spaces API - reference for API patterns

interface.name: APIPattern
interface.description: Uses createSupabaseServerClient() for server-side Supabase client. Repository pattern: SupabaseSpaceRepository. Error handling: NextResponse.json with status codes.

file.purpose: New API route for joining a space with capacity validation
Type definitions - Space interface already has capacity
file.note: Space.capacity already defined as number - no changes needed

file.purpose: Repository interface - may need capacity-specific methods
file.note: Consider adding: checkCapacity(spaceId: string): Promise<{current: number, capacity: number | null}>

file.purpose: Badge component displaying "Full" status on space cards
Test suite for capacity handling features

testCases.testCase: FullBadge renders with correct theme styling
ModernSpaceCard shows dimmed state when full
API returns 409 for full space join attempt
All 4 themes render capacity styling correctly

constraint.rule: Repository Pattern: Use ISpaceRepository for data access
Server Client: Use createSupabaseServerClient() in API routes
Type Safety: Strict TypeScript with explicit types
Anti-Duplication: Extend existing components, don't recreate
Click-Stop Protocol: Use data-avatar-interactive and stopPropagation()
Theme Tokens: Use CSS variables from tokens.css
WCAG AA: Ensure color contrast meets standards
ARIA: Use aria-label, aria-live, aria-disabled appropriately
Screen Reader: Announce capacity status changes
RLS: Policies already cover space access
Realtime: Capacity updates via Supabase Realtime

request.description: Join a space (no body required, uses auth user)

event.name: UPDATE
event.description: Triggered when space data changes (including user joins/leaves)

testingApproach.coverage: Unit tests for components, integration tests for API

test.description: CapacityIndicator displays "{current} Active" when no capacity
SpaceActionButtons Join button disabled when isFull=true
Beacon activates at 80% occupancy with "Space nearing capacity" reason
SpaceDetailPanel shows progress bar when showBar=true
